title: Diasperus rosmarinifolius
taxonomy: Diasperus rosmarinifolius is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a type of shrub native to tropical Africa. The exact classification of Diasperus rosmarinifolius may vary depending on the source and the current botanical understanding. However, it is generally considered to be a member of the Rubiaceae family, which includes plants commonly known as coffee and gardenias. More research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
